final_prompt.prompt:
Create a traditional Chinese ink wash landscape painting (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a "中国传统水墨" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 宋画 landscape tradition, 范宽 / 郭熙 monumental mountain painting, 文人画 literati ink-wash heritage; exact brushwork and wash technique is yours
Composition: must include distant mountains, mist clouds, pine trees, thatched cottage, and an old man fishing by the stream — framing is yours
Subject: must include an old man fishing by the stream as the focal subject
Scene/backdrop: must include distant mountains veiled in mist, pine trees, thatched cottage near a stream
Lighting/mood: needs an ethereal, serene atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs ink-wash monochrome with subtle tonal gradations — exact ink density is yours
Materials/textures: needs traditional xuan paper texture with appropriate wash bleeding — exact paper weight and absorbency is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
